response: The library holds 522 documents by Bahá'u'lláh. Notable works include the [Súrah of the Arabs](https://oceanlibrary.com/surah-of-the-arabs), the [Suffering of the Exalted Letters](https://oceanlibrary.com/suffering-of-the-exalted-letters), and the [Tablet of Consolation](https://oceanlibrary.com/tablet-of-consolation). As Bahá'u'lláh writes, ["The source of all good is trust in God"](https://oceanlibrary.com/gleanings-from-the-writings-of-bahaullah) — a principle woven through his teachings on tests and detachment.

query: What do you have by the Universal House of Justice?
response: The library holds 475 documents by the Universal House of Justice. Notable works include [Regarding Economic Life](https://oceanlibrary.com/administrative), [Marking the Bicentenary of the Birth of Bahá’u’lláh](https://oceanlibrary.com/administrative), and [Climate Change: Policies and Political Discourse](https://oceanlibrary.com/administrative). These writings often explore the application of spiritual principles to contemporary issues, reflecting the House's role in guiding the global Bahá'í community.
